name: Croda International plc
description: Croda International plc is a UK-based global specialty chemicals company that creates, makes, and sells high-performance ingredients and technologies. The company operates through three main sectors: Consumer Care, Life Sciences, and Industrial Specialties. Croda's products serve a wide range of industries, including personal care, home care, crop care, health care, and smart materials, focusing on sustainable and bio-based solutions to meet customer needs worldwide.
